narration_text: If God feels silent right now, try a 7-day listening reset. Each day, sit quietly for five minutes, take a few deep breaths, and pray, “Jesus, I’m listening.” Read a short passage—one Gospel story is enough. Then journal two lines: “What are You showing me about You?” and “What step are You inviting me to take today?” Midweek, share what you’re sensing with a wise friend and ask for prayer. On day seven, take one small step of obedience. Use the timing test: God’s voice stays steady through the week and brings peace, and panic fades when it’s challenged. Do this for seven days and notice your confidence rise. Save this to follow along.
